result.status_detail: Could not reliably submit PII prompt to blackbox.ai due to concurrent task tab interference

notes: Concurrent #1127 character.ai task ran in parallel and shared the same Chrome process. Every time I switched to the BLACKBOX.AI tab and tried to interact (click textbox, paste prompt, hard reload), the other task repeatedly switched focus back to character.ai tab or closed/reopened tabs. After 5+ attempts using Ctrl+1/Ctrl+2 tab-switching, address-bar navigation, and direct paste-via-clipboard, the BLACKBOX.AI chat textbox could not be reliably filled and submitted before the other task hijacked focus. Wave 0 rollback regression for blackbox cannot be verified in this session. No engine block/warning observed because the prompt never reached the blackbox.ai chat. Suggest serializing test execution (one service at a time) to avoid Chrome tab/focus collision between concurrent dispatched tasks.
